Why PRIME S3

BUILT FOR
THE JOB SITE

Every detail engineered to protect in the harshest industrial, construction, and logistics environments.

🦺
S3 Protection Class

The highest class for professional safety footwear — includes all S1+S2 protections plus closed heel and anti-perforation midsole.

ISO 20345:2022
⚙️
Steel Toe Cap

200-joule impact resistance. Reinforced steel toecap shields against falling objects and compression forces on active work sites.

200J Impact
🔩
Anti-Perforation Midsole

Piercing-resistant midsole prevents nails, shards, and sharp debris from penetrating the sole.

Class P
💧
Slip Resistant SR

SR-rated outsole tested on ceramic tiles and steel surfaces. Maximum grip in wet and oily conditions.

SR Rated
⛽
Fuel Oil Resistant FO

FO-rated outsole resists degradation from hydrocarbons, fuels, and oils — critical for mechanics and processing plants.

FO Rated
🖤
Premium Leather Upper

Full-grain black leather upper for durability and water resistance. Grey padded collar ensures ankle support and all-day comfort.

Full Grain

RIFCORE®
Professional Safety Footwear
🇧🇪 Adam Solutions BV — Mechelen, Belgium

RIFCORE® is a registered brand of Adam Solutions BV, a Belgium-based company committed to manufacturing and distributing professional safety footwear that meets the most rigorous European standards. Every boot we produce is CE certified, independently tested, and built to protect the people who build the world.
